data.description: Friday FX Options Expiries

data.title: RYVYL Inc. (NASDAQ: RVYL) files Form S-4 with SEC for proposed merger with Roundtable, shifting focus to Web3 platform.
data.description: In San Diego, CA on January 15, 2026, RYVYL Inc. (NASDAQ: RVYL) revealed the submission of a proxy and registration statement on Form S-4 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This filing marks a significant step towards RYVYL's planned acquisition of RTB Digital, Inc. (“Roundtable”) through a merger deal. The completion of this transaction would pivot the Company's operations towards Roundtable's Web3 media platform known for generating ad revenue.

data.title: Dividend 15 Split Corp. offers overnight preferred shares with a high-quality portfolio of Canadian dividend-yielding companies.
data.description: A well-performing investment portfolio comprising Canadian companies that provide dividends.

data.title: BofA CEO sounds alarm: Interest-earning stablecoins may remove $6T from US banks, per studies.
data.description: During a recent earnings call, Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan highlighted evidence indicating that yield-bearing stablecoins could attract trillions of funds away from the banking sector.
TWO-YEAR U.S. TREASURY YIELD HITS SESSION HIGH OF 3.5662, HIGHEST SINCE DECEMBER 10

data.title: Lawmakers propose higher energy costs for data centers to combat growing consumption, but no agreement on exact fees.
data.description: Several proposals have been put forth with no clear agreement among governors, Congress members, and tech executives regarding the specific amount that companies operating data centers should be charged for electricity.

data.title: Beth Leonard appointed as SVP & chief public affairs officer at Kaiser Permanente, starting Feb 2. based in Oakland, Calif.
data.description: An adept strategist in communications and advocacy has been selected to spearhead the establishment of the public affairs sector across the entirety of the organization. Beth Leonard is set to commence her role as senior vice president and chief public affairs officer at Kaiser Permanente in Oakland, California, on February 2, 2026.

data.title: Desert X AlUla 2026 opens in AlUla, Saudi Arabia, showcasing land art; fourth edition of international exhibition.
data.description: In the historical city of AlUla, located in Saudi Arabia, Desert X AlUla 2026 has been inaugurated on January 15, 2026. This event signifies the highly anticipated fourth edition of the renowned international open-air biennial exhibition. Arts AlUla, in partnership with Desert X, is hosting this exhibition and invites visitors to witness a diverse range of artistic installations.

data.title: GrayMatter Robotics secures AFWERX Phase II Contract to create AI-powered robotic system for canopy sanding, improving aircraft maintenance.
data.description: Cutting-edge technology in the form of an innovative Smart Robotic Canopy Sanding System is set to revolutionize maintenance operations for aircraft. Developed by GrayMatter Robotics, a prominent player in AI-driven robotic surface finishing solutions, this system is designed to enhance mission readiness and significantly prolong the service life of aircraft. The announcement was made in Carson, California, on January 15, 2026. This development is expected to bring about substantial improvements in efficiency with the potential to transform the sector.

data.title: Two solo Bitcoin miners defy odds, each earning $300K this week as U.S. mining control weakens.
data.description: This week, two individual Bitcoin miners achieved rare victories, with each earning close to $300,000. This comes as the U.S. mining sector's dominance shows a decline.

data.title: Bluerock Homes Trust (BHM) releases Q1 dividends on Series A and Series B Preferred Stock.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. disclosed via PRNewswire that their Board of Directors sanctioned and declared monthly cash dividends on the Company's Series A Redeemable Preferred Stock. The Company trades on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol BHM. This move underscored the Company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

data.title: Kroger Health helped 250,000 students complete drug safety program for high schools. #KrogerHealth #PrescriptionDrugSafety
data.description: In Cincinnati on January 15, 2026, Kroger Health, the healthcare arm of The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), disclosed their assistance to over 250,000 students in finishing the drug safety program for high schoolers, Prescription Drug Safety: Know the Truth.

data.title: Anderson & Vreeland celebrates 65 years in flexographic printing since starting in 1961, focused on customer support.
data.description: A technology solutions provider, Anderson & Vreeland Inc. (A&V), based in Bryan, Ohio, is celebrating its 65th anniversary, as it began operating in January 1961. Specializing in customer support, A&V has been dedicated to serving the flexographic industry.

data.title: Casca named winner in 2026 BIG Innovation Awards for banking and financial services, CEO Lukas Haffer recognized.
data.description: Lukas Haffer, co-founder and CEO, was recently honored in the category of Banking and Financial Services for his innovation. Casca, the pioneering AI-based loan origination platform, received accolades. The recognition was received in San Francisco on January 15, 2026.
